tools.name: search_concerts
tools.description: Search upcoming concerts on Gigora by any combination of city, country, artist, genre and date range. Returns up to 50 upcoming events with venue, headliner, ticket link and a gigora.live URL.

tools.name: artist_tour_dates
tools.description: Get an artist's upcoming tour dates on Gigora. Accepts the artist name or slug. Returns up to 50 upcoming shows where they headline, with venue, ticket link and a gigora.live URL.

tools.name: concerts_in_city
tools.description: List upcoming concerts in a given city over the next N days (default 30, max 365). Returns up to 50 events with venue, headliner, ticket link and a gigora.live URL.

tools.name: festival_lookup
tools.description: Find music festivals on Gigora by name and/or country, each with its next upcoming edition (date + location) and a gigora.live URL. Returns up to 50 festivals that have at least one upcoming edition.
